name: Quick Hawaiian Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 ounce package Pillsbury All-Ready Pie crusts
1 tablespoon rum, or 1 teaspoon rum extract
3 1/2 ounce package instant vanilla pudding mix
8 ounces can crushed pineapple, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare pie crust according to package directions for an unfilled one-crust pie. Refrigerate remaining crust for later use.
3. Bake at 450°F for 9-11 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool completely.
4. In a small bowl, combine 1 cup whipping cream, milk, rum (or rum extract), and pudding mix. Beat on high speed until thick, about 2 minutes.
5. Fold in 1/2 cup whipped cream, pineapple, and mashed bananas.
6. Spoon filling into the cooled baked crust.
7. Top with coconut and pecans.
8. Refrigerate at least 3 hours or until set. Store in refrigerator.
Makes 8 servings.
Per serving: 430 calories, 3 g protein, 33 g carbohydrate, 32 g fat, 60 mg cholesterol, 240 mg sodium.
Pillsbury Classic Cookbook, #86, p. 79 (33rd Bake-Off)
Submitted by Nita Crawford, Troy, Alabama
